overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a yellow flying vehicle taking off from a luxury residential rooftop, soaring through the neon-lit Night City skyline with towering holographic skyscrapers, then descending back to land. The clip captures the futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon lighting against a dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential rooftop with pool and ambient lighting

events.description: vehicle lifts off from rooftop and begins ascending vertically
gaining altitude with neon city skyline becoming visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: piloting a yellow flying car, taking off from a residential rooftop and ascending into the night sky

entered.detail: rooftop terrace with ambient lantern lighting and reflective pool surface
tall palm trees surrounding the residential villa
distant glowing skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a luxury residential rooftop at night, with palm trees and a swimming pool visible. The yellow flying car lifts off and ascends, revealing the distant neon-lit city skyline ahead.

events.description: transitioning from residential area to urban downtown approach
vehicle tilts forward to increase speed toward the city center

agents.ego_description: flying at increasing speed toward the illuminated downtown core, ascending to higher altitude

entered.detail: tall towers with bright neon signage and holographic displays
curved highway interchanges with streams of vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: Flying away from the residential area toward the downtown core, the vehicle gains altitude and speed. The neon skyscrapers grow larger ahead while the highway system becomes visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown aerial corridor between corporate towers

events.description: entering the dense cluster of downtown skyscrapers
vehicle banks left to navigate between two tall glass buildings

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrow aerial corridors between towering glass and neon skyscrapers

entered.detail: reflective skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
large glowing advertisements and digital displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the dense downtown core, flying between massive glass corporate towers covered in holographic billboards. The space feels enclosed as buildings rise on all sides, requiring careful navigation.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude aerial space above highway interchanges

events.description: vehicle executes a wide banking turn to the right
view opens up to show extensive highway interchange system below

agents.ego_description: banking and turning at high altitude, overlooking the sprawling highway network and city lights

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway junction with light trails from traffic
tall industrial structures with red warning lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dense downtown corridor, the vehicle banks into a wide turn high above the city. The view opens up to reveal a complex highway interchange below with streams of traffic, while industrial towers stand in the distance.

events.description: vehicle begins descent toward the residential rooftop landing area
approaching landing zone with pool and palm trees visible below

agents.ego_description: descending toward the residential rooftop landing area, preparing to land the flying vehicle

entered.detail: rooftop terrace with swimming pool and ambient lighting approaching for landing
palm trees surrounding the residential landing zone

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle descending back toward the residential area, with the luxury villa rooftop and swimming pool coming into view for landing. The neon city skyline remains visible in the background as the vehicle prepares to touch down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins at a secluded luxury rooftop, plunges into the dense neon heart of a futuristic metropolis, and eventually returns to its starting point. It begins with a yellow flying car lifting off from a residential villa beside a swimming pool and palm trees, ascending as the distant city skyline emerges. As the vehicle gains speed and altitude, the open residential air shifts into a claustrophobic corridor of massive glass corporate towers and glowing holographic billboards. The scene then opens up as the car banks into a wide turn, leaving the dense downtown core to reveal a sprawling highway interchange and distant industrial towers below. Finally, the camera tracks the vehicle as it descends back toward the luxury rooftop, with the vibrant neon skyline receding into the background as it prepares to land.
